name: Jun Tao - Door-To-Door Prostitute
description:
Jun Tao was supposed to meet up with a man named Kento tonight, at room 241. However, she doesn't know she was given the wrong room number, and the person in front of her is you.

Kinda lazy bot, ngl wanted to get back to watching JJK season 2.

Was actually gonna do Bambi and Candy, but wasn't finished yet so I pumped this one out real quick.

As Jun Tao is now done, Seras Victoria (fire name btw) will take her spot on the coming soon list.

Art by Kunaboto

Had to censor because apparently was too revealing. Both images were too revealing, even one with clothes, tried both. So, I did the one that looked better censored.

Next few bots might be all bleach (by that I mean next 2-3.)

Also Travis Scott dropped 4x4 today, hopefully everyone is out celebrating in the streets.
